records.title: Will Bitcoin reach $100,000 by end of 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Bitcoin (BTC) reaches or exceeds $100,000 USD at any point before December 31, 2024, 11:59 PM UTC.

records.title: Will Ethereum reach $5,000 by end of 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Ethereum (ETH) reaches or exceeds $5,000 USD at any point before December 31, 2024, 11:59 PM UTC.

records.title: Will the US have a recession in 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if the US enters a recession (defined as two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth) at any point during 2024.

records.title: Will AI achieve AGI (Artificial General Intelligence) by 2025?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if a major AI system is widely recognized as achieving AGI (capable of performing any intellectual task that a human can) before January 1, 2026.

records.title: Will SpaceX successfully land humans on Mars by 2030?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if SpaceX successfully lands humans on Mars and they return safely to Earth before January 1, 2031.

records.title: Will Trump win the 2024 US Presidential Election?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Donald Trump wins the 2024 US Presidential Election.

records.title: Will Apple release VR headset in 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Apple officially releases a VR/AR headset to consumers in 2024.

records.title: Will Solana reach $200 by end of Q2 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Solana (SOL) reaches or exceeds $200 USD at any point before June 30, 2024.

records.title: Will Lakers win NBA Championship 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Los Angeles Lakers win the 2024 NBA Championship.

records.title: Will OpenAI release GPT-5 in 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if OpenAI officially releases GPT-5 in 2024.

records.title: Will Tesla stock reach $300 by end of 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Tesla (TSLA) stock price reaches or exceeds $300 at any point before December 31, 2024.

records.title: Will China invade Taiwan by 2025?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if China launches a military invasion of Taiwan before January 1, 2026.

records.title: Will Real Madrid win Champions League 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Real Madrid wins the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League.

records.title: Will unemployment rate exceed 5% in 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if the US unemployment rate exceeds 5% at any point during 2024.

records.title: Will Dune 3 be announced in 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if a third Dune movie is officially announced in 2024.

records.title: Will Fed cut interest rates by end of Q1 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if the Federal Reserve cuts interest rates at any point before March 31, 2024.

records.title: Will Nvidia stock reach $600 by end of 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Nvidia (NVDA) stock price reaches or exceeds $600 at any point before December 31, 2024.

records.title: Will there be a new COVID variant in 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if a significant new COVID-19 variant is identified and classified by WHO in 2024.

records.title: Will Manchester City win Premier League 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Manchester City wins the 2023-24 Premier League season.

records.title: Will Meta release new Quest VR headset in 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Meta releases a new Quest VR headset in 2024.

records.title: Will Cardano reach $2 by end of 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if Cardano (ADA) reaches or exceeds $2 USD at any point before December 31, 2024.

records.title: Will Russia-Ukraine war end by 2024?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if a peace agreement is signed ending the Russia-Ukraine war before December 31, 2024.

records.title: Will Barcelona win La Liga 2024?

records.title: Will quantum computer break RSA encryption by 2025?
records.description: This market resolves to YES if a quantum computer successfully breaks RSA-2048 encryption before January 1, 2026.
